content:
# Resonance

**Summary**: The reinforcement of certain frequencies due to wave reflections within a confined space.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-almarzooq|Almarzooq, 2017]] investigated resonance effects as a factor that strengthens the impact of sand dune amplification.

## Scientific Context

- [[2017-almarzooq|Almarzooq, 2017]] Resonance within the sand dunes contributes to frequency-dependent signal distortion.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2017-almarzooq|Almarzooq, 2017]] Identified through spectral analysis of signals.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Reverberations (resonance) of seismic waves within sand dunes may strengthen the effects of the amplification. ([[2017-almarzooq|Almarzooq, 2017, p. 18]])
